title: The Texas Chainsaw Massacre Part 2
review: In a rare case of genre switch up, Tobe Hooper has come back 13 years later to continue the story as more of a campy comedy slasher, with far more jokes and less horror. The result is a very fun parodic slasher, with a little bit of {The Evil Dead} and {Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom} in it. There's a gratuitous amount of chainsawing of the scenery, and not quite as much chainsawing of flesh as you would expect.
